prediction.reasoning: Without historical data, I'm using a random walk model with estimated daily volatility of ~1% based on typical healthcare/insurance sector stocks. The point estimate assumes no drift over 6 days. Confidence intervals are calculated using normal distribution with 6-day volatility of √6 × 1% ≈ 2.45% of current price, scaled by appropriate z-scores (0.674, 1.282, 1.645 for 50%, 80%, 90% confidence levels respectively).
